evals.name: fintech-landing-page
evals.prompt: Build a landing page for a Fintech banking app with a focus on trust and clean design. Use Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons.
evals.expected_output: A professional landing page with a deep blue or clean white palette, clear trust elements, no 'AI gradients', and proper Lucide icons.

evals.name: healthcare-dashboard
evals.prompt: Design a dashboard for a Healthcare analytics platform, prioritizing accessibility and soft UI. Use Tailwind CSS.
evals.expected_output: A clean, accessible dashboard with soft colors (blues/greens), generous white space, and clear typography.
